name: Atomic City
short_description: Mouse-only for super simple gameplay, but the challenge ramps up. Survive waves of enemies bombing your city. Shoot 'em up!
detailed_description:
Your city is under attack by "you know who." Bombs are flying by the thousands. The forecast predicts very hot, dry air for the next minutes before a nuclear winter. Atomic City is a bullet hell with one minute waves. You only need the mouse and a few minutes to get into its frenetic gameplay.

How to Play:

  • On your doomsday control device (the mouse): Use the left button for left weapon, and right button for right weapon. You can use the middle mouse button to swap equipped weapons.

  • You start with basic weapons, which have infinite ammo. Adjust your aim; enemies are moving.

  • Supplies emerge from remains. Let them land to equip them. Weapons will equip the side where they land. Shoot them before landing for gold coins.

  • New weapons are powerful but have limited ammo, and once depleted, you will fall back on the basic weapons. Keep an eye on your ammo reserve.

  • Each wave of attack lasts one minute. Survive to access the shop where you can buy new supplies. End the wave without any damage for a gold bonus. Earn at least 999 gold to unlock an emergency drop, but it will cost you all.

  • Very low friction learning curve. All weapons fire, reload, and transition automatically. You can just play by holding the mouse buttons. The game is designed for ease of play without sacrificing challenge.

  • You can not beat the game, but you can top the online leaderboard.

Controls: (qwerty)

  • left weapon : left mouse button or "A"

  • right weapon : right mouse button or "D"

  • swap weapons : middle mouse button or "space"

No keyboard needed, except to pause with the "Escape" key.

Jump into Atomic City and see how long you can hold against the relentless assault!

Join the discord to say hi!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
